name: Juggernaut Freeplay
description: Advanced Random Wave Corridor Generator updated for Geometry Dash 2.2081 and Geode SDK v5.8.2.

corridor-rule.name: Corridor Generation Rule
corridor-rule.description: Select procedural corridor algorithm (Juggernaut, Classic, Narrow Slopes, Nine Circles).

speed-portals.name: Speed Change Portals
speed-portals.description: Include random speed transition portals during corridor generation.

gravity-portals.name: Gravity Portals
gravity-portals.description: Generate dynamic gravity flip portals in wave corridors.

remove-spam.name: Anti-Spam / ZigLimit
remove-spam.description: Prevents impossible high-frequency tight spam bottlenecks.
